name: GST Exemption Allocation

eligibility.description: Available to any individual making transfers to skip persons or GST trusts; requires affirmative allocation on a gift or estate tax return to maximize efficiency.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Every individual is allowed a GST exemption amount (equal to the basic exclusion amount) that can be allocated to property to reduce or eliminate generation-skipping transfer tax.
